title: Valinor Raises $25 Million to Link Blockchain and Private Credit
message_html: Valinor Raises $25 Million to Link Blockchain and Private Credit ...
snippet: Digital assets startup Valinor has raised $25 million to introduce private credit to the blockchain. That’s according to a report Monday (March 30) from Fortune, which noted that the private credit space has largely steered clear of the crypto world. “I think what these guys are doing is really just
